name: Thumbprint Kiss Cookies
recipeInstructions: Combine first three ingredients in a bowl; blend well. Form into 1-inch balls. Roll each in chopped nuts. Place on a cookie sheet. Press down center of each with your thumb. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes. Remove from oven. Place a dot of Vanilla Frosting in the center of each cookie. Immediately press an unwrapped kiss into frosting. Remove from cookie sheet; cool on a wire rack.
